title: Transparency of industry representative meetings for tobacco and vaping - Canada.ca
content:
## Transparency of industry representative meetings for tobacco and vaping
- About open government
- For  more information

## About open government
Canada's commitment to open government will  help the federal government to remain transparent and open with its citizens.  As part of this commitment, we're making more information available to the  public. We also want to create a more responsive government by providing  Canadians with more opportunities to participate in discussions on:
Industry Representatives will be notified  that information received in the following context will not be considered  confidential when:
- a meeting is requested
- at the beginning of a meeting
- correspondence is received
Personal information provided to Health  Canada during meetings will be governed in accordance with the Privacy Act.
Industry representatives will be notified  of how their personal information will be used and/or disclosed in the context  of this new policy.
The list of meetings and incoming correspondence  will be posted for 5 years.

## For more information
- Handling of information and privacy notice for Tobacco and Vaping Regulatory Initiatives
- Meetings with Tobacco and Vaping Industry Representatives
- Access to Information Act
- Canada's Tobacco Strategy
